title: nephelium topengii
intro: Nephelium topengii, also known as the Topeng rambutan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Borneo. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephelium topengii include its potential to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Nephelium topengii is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to make a herbal tea, and its fruits can be eaten raw, although it's essential to note that more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
